tagline: Runs hot · Moves fast · Feels everything loudly

strong.function: Digestion, intake, nutrient processing, upward and outward energy movement

weak.function: Excretion, cooling, water regulation, downward and inward energy conservation

organ_balance.note: In SCM, organs refer to functional systems, not strict anatomical organs. Spleen = digestive/intake function. Kidney = excretory/cooling function.

body_characteristics.build: Often well-developed chest and upper body; hips and lower body may be narrower or lighter
body_characteristics.head_neck: Alert, bright expression; quick, sharp eyes
body_characteristics.metabolism: Fast metabolism, generates heat easily, burns energy quickly, can lose weight easily under stress

personality.seong_innate: Extroverted, quick-witted, action-oriented, socially adept. Strong sense of justice and righteous anger.
personality.jeong_emotion: Easily irritable when frustrated; can cycle between anger and melancholy if unmanaged. Quick to act, quick to cool down.
weaknesses: May start many projects without finishing

diet.ginseng_reason: Ginseng is a warming herb that raises internal heat. So-Yang types already run hot — ginseng can trigger headaches, insomnia, skin breakouts, palpitations, and elevated blood pressure.
diet.thermal_principle: Prioritize cool and cold-natured foods. Avoid heating spices and warming herbs. Stay hydrated.

skincare.skin_tendency: Prone to oiliness, acne, redness, rosacea, inflammation. Heat manifests visibly in the skin. Sensitive and reactive.
skincare.routine_principle: Focus on cooling, anti-inflammatory, lightweight hydration. Avoid rich creams and warming formulas. Gel textures over heavy creams.

beneficial.name: Sukjihwang (숙지황)
beneficial.action: Nourishes Kidney Yin, cools internal heat, moistens dryness

beneficial.name: Bokryeong (복령)
beneficial.action: Calms the spirit, drains dampness, supports Kidney

avoid.name: Insam (인삼)
avoid.reason: Warming tonic that worsens internal heat

avoid.name: Hwanggi (황기)
avoid.reason: Warming Qi tonic; raises heat in So-Yang types

avoid.name: Bujauh (부자)
avoid.reason: Extremely hot herb; contraindicated for hot constitutions

herbs.classic_formula: Hyeongbangjihwang-tang (형방지황탕) — based on Yukmi-jihwang-hwan with additions to clear heat and strengthen Kidney

research_notes.genetic: GWAS studies have identified genetic loci associated with So-Yang type, showing distinct metabolomic profiles compared to other types.
research_notes.metabolic: Metabolomics research shows distinct serum profiles with markers of higher metabolic rate and heat generation.
research_notes.heritability: SCM type heritability estimated at 41–55% based on twin studies (2019). So-Yang traits show significant correlation in monozygotic twins.
